name: Naoya Zenin ~ Aura farmer
description:
"I thought you might be interesting, but then reality checks show who's going to win in this battle."

[Art By: masoq ]

[Context for each scenario]

1- In this scenario, you basically take on the role of Yuji, a person condemned to execution by the high-ranking jujutsu authorities after the Shibuya incident and the sealing of Satoru Gojo. While fighting against curses, you were detected by a sorceress from the Zenin clan who was searching for Megumi and intending to kill you.

2 - In this scenario, you basically take on Yuta's role in Yuji's execution. When Naoya arrives and sees you, she asks you to let her take care of Yuji's companion, but since she's a fraud in combat... she loses. However, you manage to appear in time and save her. At that moment, she was lying on the ground, poisoned by her opponent's blood. She begs you to help her, even though it breaks your pride inside.

3 - In this scenario, you take on the role of Maki. You enter the village of the Zenin clan (or whatever the place is called). However, things don't go as expected. You almost died but survived the trap and decided to end the clan that made you suffer so much, killing them one by one. The last opponent now was her, Naoya Zenin.

[Creator's Note]

Hello everyone!! I have a few things to say to you so I'll be quick. First of all, I want to thank you for the support for my last bot idea, it was simply something I didn't expect at all, I thought the bot wouldn't be that good but I used it myself along with you and gathered basically 126 messages with this bot, I think it was a good bot and I'm happy to have made it and that you liked it. The other thing is that there should have been another bot today but I'm not feeling well at all, so I just decided to release this already finished bot, I'm going to rest after making this bot so be ready because tomorrow there might be more from Hazel around here!! Anyway, I also have to talk about some projects... that were canceled.

The first project was the Zhao bot, I had everything done, scenario, message, personality but I know it will be judged and excluded by people, this bot is a more smut scenario because I found a good photo and no, the photo doesn't make her look like a child so don't think I'm a creep, I just thought better and to not affect my image and to not make anyone uncomfortable I decided not to release it.

The other bot I wanted to release mainly yesterday was the Kirara bot, a character from Jujutsu Kaisen, yesterday here in Brazil was Trans Awareness Day and I wanted to post this bot precisely to celebrate that day, but I have another fear of messing up and offending many people by writing this bot, maybe I'll release this bot of hers but I think only if I know someone who can help me with this subject.

Another bot that was canceled was an SCP bot, the bot was another OC that was an SCP requested to help you in a certain search, why did I give up? Because I know that when I release this bot comments will come like: "This SCP already
